title: Forge of Factions
description: The best modded factions server on 1.19.2. Vanilla+ pack centered around pvp and the factions mod. Join friends and build an empire on the official Forge of Factions server.
body:
## Multiplayer Experience & Factions
- **Unified Theme:** Stable server with a focus on simplicity in mods and structure.
- **Factions:** Land claims, alliances, and wars through the Factions mod.
- **Dynamic Economy:** Trade-centric with Lightman’s Currency for a thriving economy.
- **Discord Integration:** Direct chat connection between Minecraft and Discord.

## Enhanced Vanilla+ Combat & Survival
- **True to Vanilla:** Combat centered around vanilla-style weapons with a "Sword and Shield" approach.
- **No Overpowering Weapons:** Keeping it balanced and in line with vanilla gameplay.
- **Immersive Warfare:** Siege weaponry and aircraft for engaging battles and exploration.
- **Enhanced Gameplay Features:** Performance mods, GUI/HUD improvements, sound physics, and more for an optimal experience.
- **Authentic Survival:** No teleporting or easy tracking; pure survival with a PvP edge.
- **Proximity Voice Chat:** For real-time communication and dynamic player interactions.

## Quality of Life Enhancements
- **Seamless Experience:** Subtle mods that players miss when absent, like biome titles, avatar changes, and chat enhancements.
- **Improved Performance:** Long-distance rendering and other mods to make the game run smoother.

## Unique World Generation
- **Expansive and Diverse:** A set radius world featuring continents mod, Tectonic, Terralith, Regions Unexplored, and "Oh The Biomes You'll Go".
- **Immersive Landmarks:** A multitude of structure and dungeon mods to create engaging and fitting landmarks.
- **Balanced Diversity:** Carefully selected mods ensure the world feels cohesive and not overly fantastical.
